sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Aristoxenus</hi> Musicus [Aristox.] <date TEIform="date">iv B.C.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">Fragmenta Historica,</title_> ed.
